mapper.select: SELECT id AS "userId", username, status AS "accountStatus", employee_id AS "employeeId" FROM users WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, real_name, user_type, employee_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, 2, #{employeeId}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO users (username, password, real_name, user_type, employee_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, 4, #{employeeId}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET real_name = #{realName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
